title: Fullbright
description: Fullbright is a Minecraft feature or mod that brightens the game, making dark areas like caves clearly visible without changing the time of day. It just improves visibility.
body:
## **🌟 FullBright**

_See everything, fear nothing._

***

**🔧 What does it do?** Tired of stumbling around in the dark? FullBright instantly lights up your entire world — no torches, no night vision potions, no problem.

***

**🎲 How does it work?** Simply press **B** (its only changeable in versions after published from N4 **Options → Controls**) to toggle FullBright on or off. It silently applies a permanent night vision effect in the background — no particles, no HUD icon, just pure visibility.

***

**✅ Features**

*   🌙 True full brightness — see in complete darkness
*   🔇 Completely silent — no particles, no HUD icons
*   ⚡ Lightweight — zero performance impact
*   🎮 Client-side only — works on any server
*   🔁 Simple toggle — press B anytime to enable or disable

***

**📦 Requirements for "M1"**

*   Minecraft 1.21+
*   Fabric Loader
*   Fabric API

***

**📦 Requirements for "N4"**

*  Minecraft 1.21x
*  Fabric Loader
*  Fabric API

***

**📦 Requirements for "N3"**

*   Minecraft 1.21x
*   Forge Modloader

***

**📦 Requirements for "N2"**

*   Minecraft 1.20-1.18
*   Forge Modloader

***

**📦 Requirements for "N1"**

*  Minecraft 1.21-1.16
*  Fabric Loader
*  Fabric API

***
